prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年山东省综合类最低位次依次约37758→41295→37918→40727→41571名，整体呈波动后移趋势，近3年（2023–2025）累计后移约3653名；2025年基准位次约41571名，为近5年最高（即录取门槛最低的一年）；该校在山东省综合类招生计划2021–2022年均为78人，2023年74人，2024年84人，2025年96人，2026年计划仍为96人，与2025年持平。近5年累计扩招18人（+23%），但2026年扩招暂停，计划持平意味着竞争压力未获缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 合肥工业大学（宣城校区）为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年约第80名（校本部排名），近年排名稳定在79–83名区间，属中上水平211；2026年声誉评价偏负面，涉及学术不端事件（学生盗用作品参赛、开除涉学术不端学生）；2025年声誉亦偏负面（热门专业投档线暴跌）；抖音热度排名第77，评价为“一般”，短视频曝光量较低，对报考热度无明显提振作用；合肥工业大学第五轮学科评估中管理科学与工程为A，其余学科暂无A-及以上评级；宣城校区招生专业以工科为主，与校本部共享学科资源，但整体A级学科数量较少，对高分考生吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程、电子信息等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，该校在山东省投放的软件工程、电气工程与智能控制、机械工程等专业与热门方向匹配，对考生有一定吸引力；山东省2026年高考报名总人数约72万人，较2025年约68.1万人增加约3.9万人（+5.7%），考生规模扩大加剧竞争依据。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动后移趋势、2026年招生计划持平、山东省考生规模明显扩大（+5.7%）、学校声誉偏负面但工科专业热度尚可等因素，预计2026年竞争较2025年略有加剧，位次小幅前移。预测最低位次约41271名，区间40771–41771名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 软件工程
- 电气工程与智能控制
- 机械工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 新能源材料与器件
- 经济学
- 过程装备与控制工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 材料成型及控制工程
- 能源化学工程
- 生物技术
- 地球信息科学与技术。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（40771–41771名）内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如40000名以内）可重点冲刺软件工程、电气工程与智能控制等热门工科专业；位次接近区间上限（41700名以上）建议以三档专业为稳妥选择，同时关注二档中经济学、新能源材料与器件等专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for comprehensive subjects in Shandong Province were approximately 37758 → 41295 → 37918 → 40727 → 41571, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In the recent 3 years (2023–2025), the cumulative backward shift is about 3653 places. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 41571, the highest in the past 5 years (i.e., the lowest admission threshold). The enrollment plan for comprehensive subjects in Shandong Province was 78 students in 2021–2022, 74 in 2023, 84 in 2024, 96 in 2025, and remains 96 in 2026, unchanged from 2025. Over the past 5 years, there has been a cumulative expansion of 18 students (+23%), but the expansion paused in 2026, and the unchanged plan means competitive pressure has not been alleviated.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hefei University of Technology (Xuancheng Campus) is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 80th (main campus ranking), with stable rankings in the 79–83 range in recent years, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat negative, involving academic misconduct incidents (students plagiarizing works for competitions, expelling students involved in academic misconduct). The reputation for 2025 is also somewhat negative (sharp drop in admission scores for popular majors). On Douyin, it ranks 77th in popularity, with a rating of 'average', and low short video exposure, which does not significantly boost application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Hefei University of Technology's Management Science and Engineering received an A rating, while other disciplines have no A- or above ratings. The Xuancheng Campus mainly offers engineering majors, sharing disciplinary resources with the main campus, but the overall number of A-level disciplines is small, limiting its appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Electronic Information continue to have high social popularity. The university offers majors like Software Engineering, Electrical Engineering and Intelligent Control, and Mechanical Engineering in Shandong Province, which align with popular directions and attract some candidates. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Shandong Province college entrance examination is approximately 720,000, an increase of about 39,000 (+5.7%) from approximately 681,000 in 2025, indicating intensified competition due to the expanded candidate pool.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating and backward trend of historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the significant increase in the candidate pool in Shandong Province (+5.7%), the somewhat negative university reputation but still acceptable popularity of engineering majors, it is expected that competition in 2026 will be slightly more intense than in 2025, with rankings moving slightly forward. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 41271, with a range of 40771–41771.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Software Engineering
- Electrical Engineering and Intelligent Control
- Mechanical Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- New Energy Materials and Devices
- Economics
- Process Equipment and Control Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Material Forming and Control Engineering
- Energy Chemical Engineering
- Biotechnology
- Earth Information Science and Technology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (40771–41771), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 40000), you can focus on aiming for popular engineering majors like Software Engineering and Electrical Engineering and Intelligent Control. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (above 41700), it is recommended to choose Tier 3 majors as a safe option, while also considering Tier 2 majors such as Economics and New Energy Materials and Devices.
